name: Workflow Plan Skill Chain
description: 6-phase planning workflow with mode routing, conflict detection, and confirmation gate

entries.name: default
entries.description: Mode routing: plan, verify, or replan

entries.name: plan
entries.description: Direct: Start planning from session discovery

D_MODE.name: Plan Mode Selection
D_MODE.prompt:
Select planning mode based on user intent and context:
1. Plan — full planning flow (session discovery → context → tasks)
2. Verify — verify an existing plan's completeness and quality
3. Replan — modify/replan an existing session

Consider: existing session_id, user keywords (verify, replan, re-plan).

choices.label: Plan
choices.description: Full planning: discovery → context → conflict → tasks

D_CONFLICT.name: Conflict Risk Assessment
D_CONFLICT.prompt:
Assess conflict risk based on session discovery and context gathering results:
- Check for overlapping active sessions with same file scope
- Check for uncommitted changes in target files
- Check for recent sessions (7 days) touching same modules

Conflict risk: high (overlapping active session), low (recent but archived), none (clean).

choices.label: No Conflict
choices.description: Clean scope, proceed to task generation

D_CONFIRM.name: Plan Confirmation
D_CONFIRM.prompt:
Plan generation complete. User should review the generated tasks.

Options:
1. Verify — run plan verification (quality + completeness check)
2. Execute — plan approved, return to parent chain for execution
3. Review — user wants to manually review before proceeding

In auto_yes mode, default to Execute.
